src/main/java/com/identlite/IdentliteApp.general_idea: Enable Spring's asynchronous method execution support by adding the @EnableAsync annotation.
Remove the unused import for org.modelmapper.ModelMapper to clean up the code.
Remove the unused import for org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean to clean up the code.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Book.general_idea: Removed @NoArgsConstructor and @AllArgsConstructor annotations to simplify the DTO structure.
Removed Jackson-specific annotations like @JsonFormat and @JsonBackReference to decouple DTO from serialization logic.
src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Book.human_impl: Removed @JsonFormat and @JsonBackReference annotations and their imports.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Book.general_idea: Renamed date fields from checkInDate/checkOutDate to startDate/endDate for clearer semantic meaning.
Replaced complex entity references (RoomDto, UserDto) with a single HotelDto reference to simplify the booking model.
src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Book.human_impl: Removed 'room' and 'user' fields and added 'hotel' field.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Book.general_idea: Removed the explicit ID field from the DTO, likely delegating identification to the referenced HotelDto or handling it at a different layer.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Hote.general_idea: Removed @NoArgsConstructor, @AllArgsConstructor, and @Builder annotations to simplify the DTO structure.
Cleaned up imports for List, Set, and removed Lombok annotations that are no longer used.
Added a new 'city' field to the HotelDto to capture location data.
Removed references to RoomDto and AmenityDto collections to decouple the HotelDto from nested entities.
src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Hote.human_impl:
-    private List<RoomDto> rooms;
-    private Set<AmenityDto> amenities;

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/User.general_idea: Removed Lombok @Data, @NoArgsConstructor, and @AllArgsConstructor annotations to replace them with explicit Java code.
src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/User.human_impl: Removed imports for lombok.Data, lombok.NoArgsConstructor, lombok.AllArgsConstructor and their annotations from the class.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/User.general_idea: Added explicit no-args and all-args constructors to replace the functionality previously provided by Lombok.
src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/User.human_impl: Added public UserDto() and public UserDto(Long id, String name, String email) methods with field assignments.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/User.general_idea: Removed Jackson annotations @JsonIgnore and @JsonManagedReference as they are no longer needed for the removed or modified fields.
Explicitly initialized the bookings list in the constructor to prevent null pointer exceptions.
src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/User.human_impl: Added this.bookings = new ArrayList<>(); inside the all-args constructor.

src/test/java/com/identlite/IdentliteApp.general_idea: Enhance the Spring Boot context loading test by injecting ApplicationContext and asserting it is not null to verify proper initialization.
src/test/java/com/identlite/IdentliteApp.human_impl: Autowired ApplicationContext and added assertNotNull(context) in contextLoads()

pom.xml.general_idea: Add MapStruct library for object mapping.
Add MapStruct annotation processor for compile-time code generation.
Add Spring Security Crypto module for password encoding and hashing.
Add Spring Security Core module for authentication and authorization support.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation for Bean Validation support.
Add Spring Retry library for declarative retry support.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for automatic API documentation generation.
Add Spring Boot Starter AOP for aspect-oriented programming support.
Add Mockito Core for unit testing mocking capabilities.
Add Byte Buddy Agent for runtime bytecode manipulation in tests.
Add Mockito JUnit Jupiter integration for modern JUnit 5 testing.
Register MapStruct processor in the Maven compiler plugin to enable annotation processing.
Add JaCoCo plugin to measure code coverage during the build process.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to explicitly include test classes.

.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude the main application properties file from version control to prevent committing environment-specific configurations.
Exclude the application log file from version control to avoid tracking runtime-generated data.
Exclude the HTML report directory from version control to avoid tracking generated test or coverage reports.
Exclude the logs directory from version control to avoid tracking runtime-generated log files.
Exclude the Maven wrapper directory from version control, likely to enforce local wrapper usage or clean up repository structure.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure logging levels for Spring Web and the application package to control output verbosity.
Define custom log patterns for console and file outputs to standardize log formatting.
